title: Easy Roasted Australian Sirloin Steak Grill
description: A rich and molten weeknight Australian dish featuring sirloin steak, this recipe is perfect for a quick and flavorful dinner, and is also anti-inflammatory-friendly due to the use of turmeric and ginger.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, turmeric, ginger, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Rub the mixture all over the sirloin steak, making sure to coat it evenly.
Place the steak on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the steak in the preheated oven for 20 minutes per pound, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 135 degrees Fahrenheit for medium-rare.
Remove the steak from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes.
Slice the steak against the grain and serve with lemon juice squeezed over the top.
Let the steak rest for an additional 5 minutes before serving.
